agents.name: Planner
agents.lastMessage: Enhancing SSTR2 selectivity by introducing aromatic residues at position 5 to im

report.hypothesis: Enhancing SSTR2 selectivity by introducing aromatic residues at position 5 to improve complementarity with SSTR2-specific ECL2/TM5 contacts, and hydrophobic residues at position 11 to reduce off-target interactions while preserving SSTR2 affinity.

agents.name: Critic
agents.lastMessage: The current designs are achieving strong selectivity but are structurally subopt

report.hypothesis: The current designs are achieving strong selectivity but are structurally suboptimal. Tightening structural constraints and increasing candidate diversity should help generate more stable and structurally valid designs without compromising selectivity.

proposed_changes.rationale: Reducing the allowed clash score will enforce better structural quality and reduce structural failures.
Increasing the number of candidates will improve diversity and increase the chances of generating high-quality designs.
